name: Chromagic
author: Poki
description: Chromagic is a color game where you solve puzzles by sorting color blocks to create smooth transitions. Each level presents you with a variety of beautiful colored blocks, and your task is to place them correctly to achieve seamless color gradients. With every puzzle you solve, you'll unveil a stunning picture accompanied by fun facts. Are you ready to do some amazing chromagic? How to play Chromagic? Click to select the block and drag to move around Who created Chromagic? Chromagic is created by Viridino Studios. Play their other games on Poki: Skiddy Taxi ! How can I play Chromagic for free? You can play Chromagic for free on Poki. Can I play Chromagic on mobile devices and desktop? Chromagic can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
